section.name: Jenkins
section.p: The repository includes a Jenkins declarative pipeline in Jenkinsfile. It checks out the source, runs mvn -B clean test, generates the Maven site and generates Doxygen HTML/PDF documentation.
Jenkins archives Maven site, Doxygen outputs, Java test reports and frontend coverage reports after every run.

section.name: GitHub Actions
section.p: The test workflow runs the required Java and JavaScript test suite. The documentation workflow builds the Maven site, Doxygen HTML and Doxygen PDF, then publishes the result to GitHub Pages.
